figures.caption: Figure 1: The behavior of two different upper bounds under different sparsity levels k.
Figure 2: Upper bounds of two recovery errors under different sparsity levels.

Figure 3: Parameter sensitivity of Qp,q under correlated Gaussian sensing matrices. Each subfigure reports the average success rate, model-failure rate, and algorithm-failure rate over the tested sparsity levels.
Figure 4: Success rate curves of Qp,q under the Gaussian matrix with r = 0.3. Each panel fixes q and compares different p values as the sparsity level increases.
Figure 5: Success rate curves of Qp,q under the Gaussian matrix with r = 0.9.
Figure 6: Mean reconstruction SNR of Qp,q under correlated Gaussian sensing matrices.
Figure 7: Comparison of success rate, model-failure rate, and algorithm-failure rate on oversampled DCT matrices.
Figure 8: Comparison of success rate, model-failure rate, and algorithm-failure rate on correlated Gaussian matrices.
